message:
test(perf): add Phase 5b performance benchmarks for spring animations

Add comprehensive performance tests and benchmarks to verify 60fps
capability with spring animations:

Dashboard benchmarks (bench_test.go):
- BenchmarkDashboardView: measures View() render time (~1.4ms, target <16ms)
- BenchmarkDashboardViewAllocs: reports allocation pressure (~4390 allocs/op)
- BenchmarkDashboardViewWide: wide terminal layout performance
- BenchmarkDashboardUpdate: Update() loop with tick messages
- BenchmarkDashboardWithSprings: View() with active spring animations
- TestViewRenderTime: verifies 60fps capability
- TestUpdateLoopPerformance: verifies fast tick processing
- TestSpringAnimationOverhead: measures spring physics overhead (<0.04ms)

SpringManager benchmarks (spring_manager_test.go):
- BenchmarkSpringManagerTick50: 50 springs target <1μs (actual: ~422ns)
- BenchmarkSpringManagerTick100: 100 springs still under 1μs
- TestSpringTickPerformance: verifies tick performance target

Performance results logged to /tmp/ntm_perf_results.log for tracking.

All targets met:
- View() render: 1.6ms (10x better than 16ms target)
- Update tick: 56μs (18x better than 1000μs target)
- Spring overhead: 0.04ms (25x better than 1ms target)
- 50-spring tick: 422ns (2x better than 1μs target)

Closes: br-dja0e (Phase 5b: Performance Profiling)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
